title: Generation Credential
description: A scoped credential issued by an LLM provider for generating rights-cleared content. The rights agent coordinates with the provider to issue the credential; the provider enforces usage constraints at generation time. Any creative agent can use the credential.

provider.description: LLM or generation service provider identifier (e.g., 'midjourney', 'elevenlabs', 'stability')

rights_key.description: Scoped API key or token for generating rights-cleared content. The provider validates this key at generation time to verify the caller is authorized.

uses.description: Which rights uses this credential covers

expires_at.description: When this credential expires. Key lifetime is determined by the provider.

endpoint.description: Provider API endpoint to use with this credential, if different from the provider's default
